title: [codereview-pass3-1] coap_status.c cbor_put_* updated to uint16_t with overflow guard
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:1-70 - Updated map/array header functions for uint16_t param, added explicit >UINT8_MAX overflow set before writing. Addresses signature mismatch from map_count type. No other changes. Pass 1/3 complete.
